languages.text: "{mf|Господин|Госпожа}, магос Оксильда передает вам первые результаты работы. По ее словам, прорыв. Зря я беспокоился, что она не отвечала ранее. Вы знаете, эти увлеченные ученые..."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."
languages.original_text: "{mf|Господин|Госпожа}, магос Оксильда передает вам первые результаты работы. По ее словам, прорыв. Зря я беспокоился, что она не отвечала ранее. Вы знаете, эти увлеченные ученые..."

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

languages.text: 「貴方様、マゴス・オキルダが貴方様へ、彼女の努力の最初の成果を送りました。彼女は、これは突破口だと述べています。彼女が早く反応しなかった時は、心配する必要はありませんでした。このような科学者たちは、仕事に没頭してしまうのです…」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方様、マゴス・オキルダが貴方様へ、彼女の努力の最初の成果を送りました。彼女は、これは突破口だと述べています。彼女が早く反応しなかった時は、心配する必要はありませんでした。このような科学者たちは、仕事に没頭してしまうのです…」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, la magos Oksilda le ha enviado los primeros resultados de sus esfuerzos. Un descubrimiento, asegura. No debería haberme preocupado de que tardara en responder. Ya sabe cómo son los científicos; su trabajo puede absorberlos...».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, la magos Oksilda le ha enviado los primeros resultados de sus esfuerzos. Un descubrimiento, asegura. No debería haberme preocupado de que tardara en responder. Ya sabe cómo son los científicos; su trabajo puede absorberlos...».

languages.text: “大人，贤者奥克西尔达递交了她的首批研究成果，她声称取得了突破。之前迟迟没有回应，我还担心呢……不过我也清楚，这些贤者一旦沉浸在工作中就……”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

traits.locale_text: “大人，贤者奥克西尔达递交了她的首批研究成果，她声称取得了突破。之前迟迟没有回应，我还担心呢……不过我也清楚，这些贤者一旦沉浸在工作中就……”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Oksilda schickt Euch die ersten Ergebnisse ihrer Bemühungen. Sie spricht von einem Durchbruch. Meine Sorge, dass sie sich nicht eher gemeldet hat, war unbegründet. Diese Wissenschaftler sind mitunter einfach zu tief in ihre Arbeit versunken ..."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Magos Oksilda schickt Euch die ersten Ergebnisse ihrer Bemühungen. Sie spricht von einem Durchbruch. Meine Sorge, dass sie sich nicht eher gemeldet hat, war unbegründet. Diese Wissenschaftler sind mitunter einfach zu tief in ihre Arbeit versunken ..."

languages.text: "Magos Oksilda, çabalarının ilk sonuçlarını gönderdi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bir atılım yaşandığını söylüyor. Daha erken yanıt vermediğinde endişelenmeme gerek yokmuş. Biliyorsunuz, bu bilim insanları işlerine o kadar dalabiliyor ki..."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

traits.locale_text: "Magos Oksilda, çabalarının ilk sonuçlarını gönderdi {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bir atılım yaşandığını söylüyor. Daha erken yanıt vermediğinde endişelenmeme gerek yokmuş. Biliyorsunuz, bu bilim insanları işlerine o kadar dalabiliyor ki..."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, la magos Oskilda nous a fait parvenir les premiers fruits de son travail. Elle affirme avoir fait une découverte d'importance. Et moi qui m'inquiétais de ne pas recevoir de nouvelles de sa part... Ces scientifiques ont une fâcheuse tendance à se laisser absorber par leur travail. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Magos Oksilda has sent you the first results of her efforts. A breakthrough, she says. I needn't have worried when she didn't respond sooner. These scientists, you know, can become so engrossed in their work..."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, la magos Oskilda nous a fait parvenir les premiers fruits de son travail. Elle affirme avoir fait une découverte d'importance. Et moi qui m'inquiétais de ne pas recevoir de nouvelles de sa part... Ces scientifiques ont une fâcheuse tendance à se laisser absorber par leur travail. »
